user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my friend who loves Rick Riordan's books. As part of the party, I want to create a trivia game about the characters in his novels. Can you provide me with the details of the character with ID 789? Additionally, fetch the list of all characters in the Riordanverse and search for the character 'Magnus' in the list. Furthermore, I would like to find trending images to use as decorations for the party. Can you fetch the currently trending images?

TaskList.description: Fetch the details of the character with ID 789.
Fetch the list of all characters in the Riordanverse.
Search for the character 'Magnus' in the list of all characters.
Fetch currently trending images to use as decorations for the party.
